content:
# IVX FULL DEPARTMENT AUDIT + PROOF ONLY
# Priority: CRITICAL
# No summaries. No assumptions. Evidence only.

Audit every department end-to-end and return proof.

DEPARTMENTS TO VERIFY:

1. Landing Page
2. Featured Properties
3. Property Detail Pages
4. Registration Gate
5. Member Registration
6. Email Verification
7. SMS Verification
8. Members/Admin Module
9. Investor Dashboard
10. CRM / CMR
11. JV Deals
12. Properties Admin
13. Media Upload
14. Instagram-style Cards
15. Likes
16. Comments
17. Shares
18. Saves
19. Analytics
20. AI Owner Tools
21. Deployment Tools
22. GitHub Sync
23. Render Deployment
24. Supabase Database
25. Production Health

FOR EACH DEPARTMENT RETURN:

- Status: LIVE / PARTIAL / FAILED / UNVERIFIED
- Production URL or route
- Screenshot evidence
- API endpoint tested
- HTTP status
- Full response body
- Database table used
- Row count
- Last successful action timestamp
- Error logs if failed
- GitHub file path
- Latest commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- Production commit SHA

MANDATORY PROOF:

1. GET /health
   - HTTP status
   - Full response body

2. GitHub
   - Current branch
   - Latest commit SHA
   - Last 10 commits
   - Files changed

3. Render
   - Service name
   - Last 10 deploy IDs
   - Deploy status
   - Deploy timestamp
   - Live commit SHA

4. Supabase
   - All readable tables
   - Row count per table
   - Members count
   - Waitlist count
   - Properties count
   - Comments count
   - Likes count
   - Saves count
   - Shares count

5. Production feature test
   - Open live site
   - View property
   - Trigger registration gate
   - Create test member
   - Verify member appears in Admin/Members
   - Like a property
   - Comment on a property
   - Share a property
   - Save a property
   - Confirm all records saved in Supabase

FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT:

Department | Status | Evidence | Blocking Issue | Fix Applied | Verified By

RULES:

- Do not say COMPLETE unless production evidence proves it.
- If evidence is missing, mark UNVERIFIED.
- If API returns 404, mark FAILED.
- If production commit does not match GitHub HEAD, mark FAILED.
- If member does not appear in Admin, mark FAILED.
- No narrative.
- No planning report.
- Raw evidence only.
